LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF REMY COINTREAU USA, INC.'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO FILING A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ALTHOUGH THE COURT MAY TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE EXISTENCE OF THE AUGUST 9, 2012 ORDER GRANTING MOTION REQUESTING ADMISSIONS BE ADMITTED, THE COURT DOES NOT TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE TRUTH OF THOSE STATEMENTS FOR PURPOSES OF A MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. THE SAME IS NOT TRUE FOR A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar May-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: CAROLEE A. HOOVER, ESQ., 415.659.4900, FOR PLAINTIFF REMY COINTREAU USA, INC.; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF REMY COINTREAU USA, INC.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is denied without prejudice to filing a motion for summary judgment. Although the Court may take judicial notice of the existence of the August 9, 2012 Order Granting Motion Requesting Admissions Be Admitted, the Court does not take judicial notice of the truth of those statements for purposes of a motion for judgment on the pleadings. The same is not true for a motion for summary judgment. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Notice Of Motion Requesting Admissions Be Admitted And Sanctions Against Deft
Off Calendar Aug-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Carolee A. Hoover, Esq. of Reed Smith LLP, Tel. 415.543.8700, for plaintiff and moving party, on court call;
Michael Mengarelli, Esq. of Kelly Litigation Group, Tel. 650.591.2282, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: After hearing, PLAINTIFF REMY COINTREAU USA, INC.'s Motion Requesting Admissions Be Admitted And Sanctions Against Defendant Bridgeview Enterprises LLC is granted. Order signed in open court. Pro Tem Judge: Mark Schreiber; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
